All right, welcome to the challenge fulfillment. I'm super excited about this. We are going to be going over a lot of stuff so you can absolutely crush your challenge and have it be super seamless and deliver everything to your customers at a high level. So here's some of the things that we're going to be going over. This lesson is going to cover the following topics. Number one, finding your challenge materials. So heading over to the playbook. Number two, setting up your challenger tracking sheets so you stay super organized throughout the entire process and nobody slips through the cracks. Number three, templated fitness, nutrition and accountability. So we'll cover what the templated stuff is versus number four, custom fitness, nutrition, accountability and how you set that up. Number five, we're going to be going over challenger accountability text campaigns. So what you're texting your challenger throughout the challenge. Number six, the halfway meetings or abandoned hopes. When those take place and how those go. And then finally, number seven, way out day. The challenge has finished. How do we conclude and how do we handle and fulfill way out day? So with that being said, let's jump right into the next video. Let's dive in.
